subcodes.first_line: O thou who art as a phoenix in the kingdom of earth and heaven! Thy letter hath indeed arrived and been read before the Throne, and hath attained unto the honor of being heard when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندری فی الملک و الملکوت قد حضر کتابک و قرء لدی العرش و فاز بالاصغاء اذ
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @consolation and comfort
